review: Mui huong:Ngot nhe, thomm Phu hop voi loai da:minh nghi la moi loai da Cong dung:duong trang nhung ma ch thay trang chi thay thom nhe  Helu mn, minh feeedback dayy. Minh nghi ai cung muon co loi khuyen that long, vay minh se co gang de mieu ta trai nghiem nhe. Minh thu nghiem trong mot tuan, co ket hop ca scrub body dove tu unilever loai sakura luon. Sau thi minh thay hien tai no chi thom la chinh, da minh cung deu mau hon nhung ma mau ngam ngam . Um minh nghi ve phan duong trang thi kbt tnao nhung minh nghi kh qua hieu qua. Tu hinh anh ban thay da minh truoc va sau day. Minh co cai vong thi n cung che nang phan nao nhung ma cam giac da de bat nang lam. Ngu day phong he he anh sang ma cam giac da ngam hon roi hic khong biet co phai do minh khong. Minh van boi KCN MOI NGAY NHE. Minh boi kha day, dung loai senka duong am cong them ca ao chong nang ma van ngam. Mn biet s cach nao huong dan minh trang hon voi hic. Thi day la trai nghiem cua minh. Them nua muon nhan qua moi nguoi phai an du qua trong gio nhe. NHO AN DUU!! A voi ca rcm xem phim materialist. KH PR DAU nhma n hay that. Camon mn <33

review: Toi rat hai long voi dich vu cua nguoi ban va shipper lan nay. San pham toi dat mua khong chi chat luong tuyet voi ma con duoc giao dung hen, nhanh chong. Shipper rat nhiet tinh, chu dao va luon cap nhat tinh trang don hang thuong xuyen, giup toi an tam hon trong suot qua trinh mua sam. San pham duoc dong goi can than, khong bi hu hong, bao ve an toan trong qua trinh van chuyen. Dieu nay cho thay su chuyen nghiep va tam huyet cua nguoi ban trong viec cham soc khach hang. Toi danh gia cao su tan tam cua nguoi ban khi san sang ho tro toi giai dap moi thac mac truoc khi mua hang. Su giao tiep ro rang va nhanh chong khien toi cam thay thoai mai va tin tuong. Toi chac chan se tiep tuc ung ho trong cac lan mua sam tiep theo va gioi thieu den ban be, nguoi than. Cam on nguoi ban va shipper da mang den mot trai nghiem tuyet voi.
label: positive

review: Review nhe mot so dong sua con uong tang can tot cho cm quan tam - Grow do: be uong de tieu hoa tuy nhien be nao uong hap thi len kg tot, k hap sua thi k cai thien nhieu - Dong Meiji la sua mat, sua noi dia nhat,  khong lo bon nhung gia kha cao vs khong phai be nao uong cung len kg tot - Friso: sua de tieu hoa, vi nhat thanh gan nhu sua me, kha de uong, con uong output dep. Co the dung lam sua chua hoac lam banh cho con deu oki ca - Oggi: sua giup be tang can tot, ko bon, len tam 5-6 lang/thang, co nhieu vi de thay doi cho con,ngoai ra dong nay con co ca sua cong thuc pha san co the tuy khau vi de lua chon cho be Muon con len can thi ngoai sua cong thuc thi che do an hang ngay cua be cung quan trong khong kem, bo sung day du cac nhom chat la viec nen lam de con co the tang kg tot hon. Me nao can co the tham khao
label: positive

review: Hieu qua:Sach Thiet ke:Dep  Thiet ke nho gon, tien loi: Kich thuoc nho, trong luong nhe, de dang bo tui, balo, ly tuong cho viec di chuyen. Cao sach va nhanh: Luoi dao sac ben (thuong la thep khong gi), co the tu mai, hoat dong voi tan suat cao, giup cao sach va nhan min nhanh chong. Da nang: Nhieu mau tich hop them chuc nang cat tia long mui, tai, hoac co the cao uot/kho linh hoat. An toan cho da: Thiet ke luoi dao giam thieu ma sat, it gay tray xuoc, phu hop voi da nhay cam. Hoat dong em ai: Dong co manh me nhung hoat dong nhe nhang, khong gay tieng on lon. Chong nuoc: Nhieu dong co chuan IPX6/IPX7, cho phep ve sinh duoi voi nuoc hoac dung voi bot cao rau. Pin lau & sac tien: Pin sac (thuong qua USB-C) voi thoi luong su dung dai (co the len toi 1-2 thang cho 1 lan sac day), sac nhanh va pho bien.
label: positive

review: Giao hang nhanh, dong goi dep an toan Mui Pink khong ngot nhieu nhu review dau ma ngot mat, huong dau xit ra co mui nhu mui sua tam binh thuong, sau khi xit tam vai phut thi de lai mui thom hon, minh thich huong giua va huong cuoi cua mui nay. Voi gia nay minh thay dang de trai nghiem nhung khong den muc mua lai lan 2, mui huong cua hang lam cung thom diu kieu thom da thit sach se i, mui luu hon 2 tieng. review: Minh thuc su rat that vong ve chiec tai nghe nay va cam thay can phai de lai danh gia chi tiet de nhung nguoi khac can nhac ky truoc khi mua. Khi doc mo ta san pham, minh thay quang cao rat hap dan: am thanh chat luong cao, bass manh, ket noi on dinh, pin trau, thiet ke gon nhe va deo thoai mai. Tuy nhien, trai nghiem thuc te lai hoan toan nguoc lai, khien minh co cam giac nhu bi lua. Truoc het, ve chat luong am thanh: am thanh nghe rat chan, thieu do trong treo, bass thi yeu, treble bi re, am mid thi mo nhat. Khi mo nhac nhe cung khong ro, con khi nghe nhac manh mot chut la am thanh bi vo, nghe cuc ky kho chiu. Minh tung dung nhieu loai tai nghe gia re khac con cho chat luong tot hon the nay. Thu hai, ve ket noi Bluetooth: rat chap chon va khong on dinh. Thinh thoang dang nghe nhac hay xem phim thi tu dung bi ngat ket noi, phai ket noi lai nhieu lan. Dac biet khi dung de goi dien thi do tre cao, giong nguoi ben kia nghe khong ro, con minh thi lien tuc bi than phien la giong re va nho. Thu ba, ve pin va sac: quang cao pin dung duoc 5-6 tieng, nhung thuc te chi duoc khoang 2 tieng ruoi la da het. Hop sac cung rat kem, sac day pin ma van bao yeu. Co lan minh vua sac day, rut ra dung duoc khoang 30 phut la het pin. Ro rang day la mot san pham kem chat luong. Thu tu, ve thiet ke: nhin hinh anh tren quang cao thi dep, nhung nhan hang thi thay nhua mong, long leo, cam len cam giac rat re tien. Deo vao tai thi khong om khit, de roi ra khi di chuyen. Chi can di bo nhe thoi cung bi tuot, rat bat tien. Cuoi cung, dich vu ban hang cung khong tot. Minh nhan cho shop phan anh thi tra loi cham, con do loi la do minh dung sai. Thuc su day la cach ban hang thieu trach nhiem, chi chu trong ban ma khong quan tam trai nghiem cua khach. Tom lai, day la mot trai nghiem mua hang cuc ky te. Tai nghe chat luong kem, khong dung nhu quang cao, vua mat tien vua mang buc vao nguoi. Minh khuyen moi nguoi khong nen mua san pham nay de tranh roi vao hoan canh giong minh. Neu co the minh tham chi khong muon cho 1 sao.
label: negative

review: [Shop dao lua] moi nguoi can nhac khi mua hang.  Duoi day la Trai nghiem cua minh  - 7/7 minh san 1 bo my pham ben nay gom 7-8 san pham -Giao hang tre, giao THIEU serum + kcn+1 qua tang da the dong hang khong can than... -Lien he lai thi nhan hang da bong day TN qua san, lien he shipper SP thi ban nay kiem tra dong goi, van chuyen SP hoan ve... -Tuy nhien ben san tu choi khieu nai ,thong bao do ben ban co bang chung ve viec dua tan tay den minh du san pham, nhung khi yeu cau bno dua ra bang chung de cap den quyet dinh xu ly nay thi  khong cung cap lai, tranh ne va day ly do sang huong khac hang boc seal meo (phan nay phai check lai ben shipper dong goi van chuyen hang hoan chu) ...ba cham thuc su (xu ly khieu lai 3 tuan troi den) Bao che nhau, lua lay tien nguoi tieu dung, nhan hang nay nen bi TAY CHAY, ben shoppee cung nen xem lai cach xu ly khieu nai, cac ban khong cung cap duoc bang chung ben cac ban dang lam dung du den cho ng mua => Ket qua cuoi cung  la minh van phai nhan lai bo san pham thieu (lai con lam vo tum lum khong nhu luc minh dua lai cho ship hoan)va shop van lay toan bo don hang cua minh Tien mat coi nhu cua bo thi , mat vi minh  qua tin tuong shoppee mall, da k canh giac voi chieu tro lua dao truc tiep nhu vay  MOI NGUOI NEN CANH GIAC VOI SHOP NAY, de co the bao ve duoc quyen loi cua minh. shop mall ma lam viec vo van, Shop dao lua tren san Cam  Khong the nao thong cam noi, xin phep cho shop va san ra chuong  bye:)) Doc 1 sao thay co ban cung gap truong hop kieu nhu minh:))))))))))))

review: DANH GIA NAY DANH CHO NHUNG AI MUON DAT DON SUA GIAO HANG QUA HINH THUC HOA TOC   Chi 1 tu thoi TE! Toi co dat thung sua, chon nham qua giao hang hoa toc. Chi vai giay sau khi dat hang toi da biet minh chon nham qua giao hang hoa toc nen da huy don hang ngay lap tuc. Nhung ben phia shop bat phai cho SHOP DUYET HUY MOI DUOC HUY DON.  Luc dat hang la dem, ben phia shop khong con gio lam viec nen cung nghi chac sang mai shop lam viec lai thi se duyet cho huy don. NHUNG MA KHONG, SHOP TU CHOI YEU CAU HUY DON VA VAN TIEP TUC SHIP HANG NHU BINH THUONG   !! MOI NGUOI LUU Y NHE, DAT SHIP HOA TOC SHOP SE KHONG CHO HUY DON DAU.   Luc vao kiem tra lai don hang, thay tu choi yeu cau huy don hang va da giao hang cho ben van chuyen roi... Thoi lo nhu vay thi toi cho nhan hang luon, tuong dau ship hoa toc phai nhan trong ngay. Cho mai chang thay dau.... Den tan 4 ngay sau moi co shipper giao hang, ma giao gio nao, 10 gio dem shipper goi giao hang do.... Cai gi vay troi???? MOI THU NHU HOA DIEN!!!!!!!!!!   Do shipper goi giao hang tre qua, shipper khong lien he duoc de giao hang. The la shipper xac nhan tren he thong la da giao hang thanh cong va cuom mat luon thung sua cua khach dat va mat hut.

review: Loi ich:chua xai Lam dep:da minh la da hon hop thien kho, nhay cam Huong thom:chua xai nen khong biet  Minh mua 2 san pham chinh la kem duong sang mo tham va kem chong nang cua L'Oreal. Ve chat luong san pham thi minh chua dung nen chua the nhan xet. Tuy nhien trai nghiem mua hang lam minh kha buon. Luc dat don 409k thi thay thong tin duoc tang 3 qua, con chuong trinh sau la don 389k se tang 1 trong 3 qua (2 khoang thoi gian khac nhau deu co qua tang khac nhau nhung thoi gian nao cung dc deal qua). Ca 2 truong hop minh deu du dieu kien, nhung khi nhan hang thi chi co qua tang kem kem chong nang la chai nuoc tay trang nho, con qua tang cua kem duong sang (serum, lan duong chat, nuoc tay trang) lai khong co. Minh da nhan tin hoi shop thi duoc tra loi rang "deal khong cung qua thi khong cong don", nhung cach tra loi kha hoi hot, copy lai y chang, khong giai thich ro rang de khach hieu. Thuc su hoi that vong voi cach lam viec cua shop ve cach tu van: khong them giai thich ro rang. Cach lam viec nay vua thieu chuyen nghiep, vua lam khach hang cam thay bi coi thuong. Mong shop xem lai thai do tu van va minh bach hon ve qua tang, chu nhu vay thi mat niem tin lam. Va cung nhu la nhung trai nghiem ko tot nua
label: negative

review: Cong dung:lam sach da, duong sang  Minh dung dc 1 tuan roi thay on, chua thay sang da nhung sach da lam, chac phai dung lau dai moi sang da dc. Nhung dieu minh k thich o day la thai do cua nhan vien, nhan vien tra loi tin nhan rat hoi hot luon, minh nhan tin nho shop tu van rat nhieu lan nhung lan nao cung bao la san pham chi danh 18+ tro len, trong khi sua rua mat la day thi da su dung dc roi. Minh chua kip load thi shop ket thuc cuoc tro chuyen roi,  xong minh ib them lan nua thi shop van rep y nhu tren roi lai ket thuc cuoc tro chuyen khien minh rat buc luon. Luc do shop cung dang live stream nen minh cmt tren live cua shop hoi ro luon thi shop bao day thi da dc su dung sua rua mat roi va con noi la chac do luong tin nhan nhieu qua nen cac ban nhan vien nhan tin hoi hot . Nhung theo minh, thai do moi lam nen su tin tuong cua khach hang, mong shop rut kinh nghiem a. chac lan sau minh se k mua lan nua, vi minh k thich thai do cung nhu cach tu van ben shop. review: Phai noi la vo cung THAT VONG. Toi dat combo 2 thung sua bich va thu toi nhan duoc la mot khoi bay hay nang gan chuc ky, uot sung va boc mui chua loet. Nhin a shipper kho so voi cai dong nay chay toi lui trong cai nang nong, thoi thi nhan, khui ra roi phan loai hang lanh lan...  Cam on kien truc su dong goi cua shop da xep chong 2 thung sua giay len nhau de chung minh rang trong luc la co that. Thung tren voi toan bo trong luong 4.5kg (24 x 180) da tro thanh mot cai may ep, tac dong luc nen thang dung len cac bich sua mong manh o thung duoi. Ket qua la 4 bich nam o thung xep duoi bep di, xi ra, trao nguoc len lam nhun ca thung tren. Ca mot cong trinh kien truc that vung chai cho mot thi nghiem len men that bai. Va dang noi la don nay chi giao trong TPHCM voi nhau da the, chu chua phai gui hang di My.  1 sao cho cai tu duy DONG GOI xep chong 2 thung cho loai hang de vo. Day la loi he thong, chua can ban den khau van chuyen. Cach lam nay cho thay shop san sang day rui ro ve phia van chuyen, hoac khach hang de tiet kiem vai dong chi phi dong goi. Ai co y dinh mua "combo" thi chuan bi san tinh than nhan "sua chua tu u", phien ban ko chua ko lay tien nhe.
label: negative

review: Minh vua nhan hang nen khong the danh gia chat luong san pham ra sao, nhung thai do cua ben CSKH thi vo cung te. Bao bi san pham co loi, co hien tuong bi ro ri tinh chat ra ngoai o phan voi xit khi lac san pham hoac de san pham nam xuong. Minh co nhan voi shop, nhung shop chi xin loi roi bao minh nhan tra hang hoan tien de ben Shopee xem xet. Shop xin loi cho co, roi de het cho Shopee voi khach hang tu giai quyet voi nhau. Minh cho tan 2 tuan moi nhan duoc hang, hang quoc te lai can Tet, roi ben van chuyen nay kia nen minh cung danh cho. Vi tin tuong hang nen minh cung khong qua de y, minh dung serum, kem duong ben hang trom via hop nen mua hang cua shop cung hon 5 lan roi, the ma den lan nay bao bi san pham co loi thi shop lai giai quyet nhu vay. Tra loi tin nhan lau nua chu. Chat luong san pham cua hang minh danh gia rat cao, cac thang truoc hang co sale minh con mua san pham cua hang de tich tru den nay van con co ma, nhung thai do CSKH nhu vay nen minh xin phep danh gia 1 sao. Minh that su vo cung that vong voi trai nghiem mua hang lan nay o shop.

review: [REVIEW NGHIEM TUC, CANH TINH CHO AI CHUAN BI MUA HANG] Minh truoc dung hang nha D Invisible rat nhieu lan rat an tam, nhung lan nay quyet dinh su dung san pham ben hang nay, mot la vi muon thu cai moi, hai la ung ho hang Viet Nam, nhung thuc su rat that vong.   Minh da dung thu cai Rainbow Gel, khi xong thi thao ra co dung luc rat nhe ma bi rach. Ta hoa so qua loi ra test tung loai mot.  Cai Last Long (mau vang) thi cuc ki te, it gel, mong kieu mong manh, va gion khong dai, nen dung mot luc rat nhe keo gian va tieng no tao ra nhu kieu vo toac hon la rach. Cuc ki te.   Cai Rainbow Gel (mau cau vong) nhieu gel hon, nhung cung rat de rach.  Cai Extra Dots (mau cam) thi dai, kho rach nhat, vi duong nhien la no day nhat so voi ca ba => khong chan that, nhieu mui cao su.   HAY BAO VE CHINH TUONG LAI CUA MINH CHU DUNG HAM RE.   Neu hang nay tiep tuc lam nhu vay, khong co cai thien gi thi se khong lam an ben lau duoc dau. Thoi xin phep bo tien mua khon. Se tiep tuc quay lai su dung hang D Invisible cho an tam.
label: negative

review: Bao bi:Simple Kinh nghiem su dung:4 nam Meo:Rua mat  Dong goi cai kieu gi vay? Lam an thanh cong qua roi nen bay gio co the dong goi mot cach so sai nhu vay voi khach hang sao? Toi con tuong minh mua phai hang gia co day? Con tinh tra hang hoan tien, nhung nghi lai mac cong noi chuyen cac nguoi lai ki keo de dung danh gia xau, toi de mem long lam. De nghi "Shop Lon?" nen hoc lai cach dong goi cho khach hang di (cung khong biet voi ai cung vay hay chi voi minh toi thoi?). Bon nam su dung simple lan dau tien gap phai truong hop nhu vay do, ngay ca cua tiem nho dong goi gui di cung se khong tiet kiem den muc ngay ca boc chong soc cung khong co, lam an lon qua roi thi dung tiet kiem ba dong bac le bo di do nha. review: The worst experience ever. Contacted them the day I recieved my order with the broken bottle. After numerous messages back and forth and almost 3 weeks later, i told them i'll just keep the product and put into another bottle but that they should reimburse me somehow for the trouble but i get a message days later thanking me for understanding.  I never write a negative review but this left a sour taste and i expected better from such a big brand.
